status: Phase 5 COMPLETE (v1.1.0, 2026-04-20). All 8 milestones shipped (M28 → M35). 1169 unit tests / 11 E2E specs / 12 Playwright cases. Phase 6 is open with no milestones materialised yet. The first Phase 6 task is T0 — author the Phase 6 plan doc at docs/plans/2026-0X-XX-team-x-phase-6-<theme>.md using the Phase 5 design doc (docs/plans/2026-04-13-team-x-phase-5-intelligence-layer.md) as the structural template. Scope selection draws from the 7 candidate themes enumerated in the Phase 5 retrospective §6: (1) post-release telemetry digest for evidence-based default tuning, (2) cross-company copilot rollups, (3) proactive copilot → autonomous action, (4) agent-to-agent negotiation, (5) capabilities frontmatter on role.md (enables role-fit scoring beyond the M32 keyword heuristic), (6) real customer demo (docs/demo/ walkthrough is the foundation), (7) insight export. DO NOT author milestone task breakdowns in T0 — T0 is plan-doc-only, mirroring Phase 5 M28 T0.

targets.phase6T0: Phase 6 plan doc at docs/plans/2026-0X-XX-team-x-phase-6-<theme>.md — structural mirror of docs/plans/2026-04-13-team-x-phase-5-intelligence-layer.md; required sections: Overview, What ships, Invariants preserved, Success criteria, Milestone breakdown (placeholder count), Acceptance criteria, Decisions log scaffold. Zero code / zero tests in T0.

notes: Phase 5 COMPLETE (v1.1.0, 2026-04-20). This file is the Phase 6 scaffold; it holds no in-flight tasks until the Phase 6 plan doc (T0) materialises the T1+ breakdown.
First Phase 6 atomic commit: `feat(phase-6-t0): Phase 6 T0 — plan doc (<theme>)`. Ledger: `chore(loki): Phase 6 T0 — commit ledger (<sha>)`.

Theme selection must be explicit — do not default-pick. The Phase 5 retrospective §6 lists all 7 candidates with rationale + estimated size. Pick one headline theme (or combine two if they share an evidence backbone, e.g. post-release telemetry + autonomous action).

Patterns to carry forward from Phase 5 into Phase 6 T0: atomic + ledger commit cadence, three-tier canned test seam (quartet pattern — any new agentic surface MUST ship a matching test-side swap), pause-aware providerRouter.complete wrapper, source-string-audit unit test lineage (now 4-deep: M35 T3/T8/T9/T10), ABI rebuild dance, is_system filter sweep with isSystemRoleId predicate, invariant #11 (IPC mutation must emit bus event), locked six-section phase retrospective structure.
